title: Suspicious Sand Full Red
description: A resource pack that changes the texture of suspicious sand to full red, making it easier to spot it.
body:
A resource pack that changes the texture of suspicious sand to full red, making them easier to see.

There are also resource packs to : - change the Suspicious Blocks texture to Full red -> [Suspicious Blocks Full Red](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/suspicious-blocks-full-release) - change only the Suspicious Gravel texture to full Red -> [Suspicious Gravel Full Red](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/suspicious-gravel-full-red) Check my profile for tons of packs like these!

**Got an issue or a question? → Send me a message on Discord: enigmusse** By the way, I'm also on the Modrinth and CurseForge Discord servers.

**How to use it?** 1. Copy it into the resource packs folder of your Minecraft instance. 2. Open the escape menu, click **Resource Packs**, and select **"Suspicious Sand Full Red"**!

**Compatibility Notice** The resource pack functions correctly despite the compatibility warning. Simply confirm by selecting **Yes** when prompted. To suppress this notification completely, install the mod: - [No Resource Pack Warnings (Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings) Without this solution, I'd need to create and upload a separate archive for nearly every minor Minecraft version — even though the textures remain unchanged — leading to unnecessary extra work.
